_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: with a significant reduction in reported tumor pain occurring as early as cycle 4 (LSM estimate=2.7; t=4.42, p=0.0001) that persisted to cycle 12
details: Significant reduction in reported tumor pain occurred as early as cycle 4 (LSM estimate=2.7; t=4.42, p=0.0001) that persisted to cycle 12 in responders
